titleEn: iQuus put to the test in practice
titleZh: iQuus自动驾驶拖拉机在荷兰农场实战测试
summaryZh: 本文报道了荷兰一家300公顷大田农场对搭载iQuus系统的纽荷兰T6.180自动驾驶拖拉机进行实地测试的情况。该系统在土豆种植前完成了66小时的整地作业，旨在探索自动驾驶技术能否缓解熟练农机操作员短缺的问题。文章提供了初步印象和实际应用数据，对智慧农业领域的自动化实践具有参考价值。
translationZh: 自动驾驶拖拉机能否帮助解决日益严重的熟练操作员短缺问题？为了找到答案，Frits和Berthy Broekman在位于荷兰凯克多姆村的300公顷Spaldrop大田农场，让一台配备iQuus系统的纽荷兰T6.180拖拉机投入工作。该系统在土豆种植前的整地作业中累计运行了66小时，提供了初步印象和实际应用数据。
featuredReason: 本文展示了自动驾驶拖拉机在真实大田作业中的初步应用数据，对关注智慧农业自动化解决方案的从业者具有实践参考意义。
contentFull: iQuus put to the test in practice 12-06 | Autonomous/semi-auto steering systems | ArticleFrits and Berthy Broekman put an iQuus-equipped New Holland T6.180 to work on their 300-hectare arable Spaldrop farm in the Dutch village of Kekerdom. Photos: Peter Roek Can an autonomous tractor help solve the growing shortage of skilled operators? To find out, Frits and Berthy Broekman put an iQuus-equipped New Holland T6.180 to work on their 300-hectare arable Spaldrop farm in the Dutch village of Kekerdom. The system logged 66 hours preparing land ahead of potato planting, providing a first impression of its strengths and weaknesses in day-to-day farming. The assessment is based on a star rating, with 5 stars being the maximum.
